sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n77429" key="panqauma/sios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παν-θαυμάσιος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> sq., <sense id="n77429.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">φάρμακον</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg015:15" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15.15</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
